headline: China Military Aid to Malaysia Reaches RM1.2 Billion Total
context: China provided RM1.2 billion in military equipment and training to Malaysia between 2020 and 2025 largest from any single country.

cards.big: China gave RM1.2 billion military aid to Malaysia from 2020 to 2025
cards.sub: Aid included radar systems naval equipment and 450 training scholarships

cards.big: 4 Chinese-built littoral ships delivered to TLDM at RM280 million each
cards.sub: Ships based on Type 056 corvette adapted for Malaysian requirements

cards.big: US expressed concern about Chinese equipment in Malaysian armed forces
cards.sub: Pentagon warned interoperability with FPDA could be affected

cards.big: Malaysia conducted 8 joint exercises with China in 2025 versus 4 with US
cards.sub: Balance of military engagement shifted notably toward Beijing recently

cards.big: China aid tests whether Malaysia can balance competing military partnerships
RM1.2 billion in Chinese military aid. Defence partnerships must be transparent about strategic obligations.
